message:
fix(web): stabilize sequence grid scroll + AA alignment

- rendering/VirtualScroller: clamp scrollX to 0 when horizontal scrolling is not possible (maxScrollX==0) to prevent phantom startIndex drift from diagonal trackpad/touch deltas; keep hit-testing consistent.
- rendering/CanvasSequenceGridRenderer: fix AA-mode rendering by passing aminoSequence through the single-row path; align amino-acid glyphs to codon boundaries for both strands; clip partial codons cleanly at row/window edges.
- rendering/GeneMapRenderer: treat gene coordinates as 0-based half-open [start,end) during hit-testing.
